title: Eclipse Origins
description: Adds a few characters from Eclipse universe as Origins.
body:
## Description
Adds a few characters from Eclipse universe as Origins.
Requires [Origins](https://modrinth.com/mod/origins) and [Pehkui](https://modrinth.com/mod/pehkui).

This version _(v2.1.0)_ includes Rosechild, Prototype, González and Jinx.

## Community
Join our [Discord](https://discord.gg/cUGy4pMNK4) server to vote for upcoming Origins!

## Origins
![An image describing the Origins available in v2.0.0 Preparation Update.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/1It7vbfm/images/a5cc74a4d983686e8f997ecd9d8e6d7d6a4d4a70.png)
